CHAR 1 If equal to one, the data in this column identifies that none of the above were recalled. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
111 C1000_DCSN_MKNG_CD C1000_DCSN_MKNG_CD C1000 Cognitive Skills for Decision Making Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's level of decision-making ability. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Independent-decisons consistent/reasonable
1=Modified independence-some difficulty in new situations
